summary: Focused on building a SaaS crypto trading platform with AI, alongside hardware emulation firmware and various research projects in computer vision and price prediction. Also maintained Windows utilities, Android LLM assistants, and workflow automation tools.

items.title: Crypto trading platform with AI
items.description: Built a SaaS crypto algorithmic trading platform incorporating AI and neural network components.

items.title: On-device LLM assistant for Android
items.description: Created an Android app providing LLM capabilities with phone control features.

items.title: Clash proxy fork for FlClash
items.description: Maintained a fork of Clash proxy with custom API support for FlClash.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID emulation firmware
items.description: Developed feature-rich firmware for mouse and keyboard emulation on ESP32-S3.

items.title: Input emulation and screen capture research
items.description: Researched computer vision and input emulation for overlaying and screen capture.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Conducted R&D on cryptocurrency price prediction models.

items.title: Computer vision for online poker
items.description: Explored computer vision techniques for online poker platforms.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Developed a Telegram integration node for n8n workflow automation.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging (legacy)
items.description: Worked on the original file tagging utility for Windows Explorer.

items.title: Neovim configuration setup
items.description: Set up and maintained a personal Neovim IDE configuration.

items.title: YOLO annotation tool
items.description: Built a minimalistic on-host labeling tool for YOLO object detection.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging v2 release
items.description: Prepared the v2.0 release of the file tagging utility for Windows Explorer, including Microsoft Store submission.

items.title: Telegram automation node maintenance
items.description: Performed maintenance and version updates on the Telegram n8n integration node.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging utility
items.description: Built a Windows Explorer extension to assign tags to files and folders.

items.title: Freqtrade trading strategies
items.description: Developed custom trading strategies for the Freqtrade bot.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Worked on an autonomous multi-session AI coding assistant.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Developed and maintained a Telegram integration node for n8n workflow automation.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging utility
items.description: Developed the initial version of a file tagging utility for Windows Explorer.
